my_files: tiktoken/core.py
note: Finished. Added return_positions: bool = False param to Encoding.encode() (signature, docstring, and body only - tokens are computed as before, then if return_positions is True I reuse decode_with_offsets() to compute per-token starting character positions and return (tokens, positions) instead of just tokens). No other methods touched. All existing tests pass except a pre-existing unrelated hypothesis flake (test_hyp_batch_roundtrip) that also fails on main without my changes. You're clear to edit core.py now and add your transformers param on top.

type: DONE
my_files: tiktoken/core.py
note: Finished. Added transformers: Callable[[str], str] | Sequence[Callable[[str], str]] | None = None param to Encoding.encode() (signature, docstring, and body only). If provided, text is piped through the transformer(s) in order before the existing allowed/disallowed special-token logic and BPE encoding. Verified via manual sanity checks and existing encode-related tests, all passing. No other methods touched.
